case_title: IPSOFACTO, LLC VS. JMA VENTURES LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-17-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-17-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY IPSOFACTO, LLC BESPOKE HOSPITALITY LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-22-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BESPOKE HOSPITALITY LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IPSOFACTO, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BESPOKE HOSPITALITY LLC $2,594.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,659.00, SEE ATTACHED ONE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY IPSOFACTO, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BESPOKE HOSPITALITY LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE CT CORPORATION SYSTEMS] FILED BY PLAINTIFF IPSOFACTO, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BESPOKE HOSPITALITY LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2023 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF IPSOFACTO, LLC., IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY STEVE BOULLIANE. DEFENDANT JMA VENTURES LLC., IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SETH POPE AND DUNCAN MACLEA. DEFENDANTS STATED FOR THE RECORD THAT THE NAME OF BESPOKE HOSPITALITY LLC IS THE CORRECT DEFENDANTS NAME AND WOULD BE RESPONSIBLE FOR ANY AWARD IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF. BOTH PARTIES AGREED TO HAVE THEIR MATTER HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
